payload.claim_text: The fare changes would not have a disparate impact or disproportionate burden on minority or low-income populations
payload.subject: fare changes

records.raw_text: CTDOT ... published its equity analysis on its webpage, which concluded that the fare changes would not have a disparate impact or disproportionate burden on minority or low-income populations

payload.claim_text: UniTicket prices will not be affected by the proposed increase. UniRail prices will be increased based upon CTDOT's determination of fares.

records.raw_text: UniTicket prices will not be affected by the proposed increase. UniRail prices will be increased based upon CTDOT's determination of fares.

payload.claim_text: CTDOT proposes that New Haven Line fares for travel to or from stations located in the State of Connecticut be increased by 5%, effective September 1, 2025
payload.subject: New Haven Line fares to/from Connecticut stations

records.raw_text: CTDOT proposes that New Haven Line fares for travel to or from stations located in the State of Connecticut be increased by 5%, effective September 1, 2025

payload.claim_text: Metro-North will also implement CTDOT's Connecticut Branch Line fare increases at the same times as the New Haven Main Line increases. Under ARSA, Branch Line fares are solely determined by CTDOT.

records.raw_text: Metro-North will also implement CTDOT's Connecticut Branch Line fare increases at the same times as the New Haven Main Line increases. Under ARSA, Branch Line fares are solely determined by CTDOT.

records.display_name: No Fare Change for New York State Travel

payload.claim_text: There will be no change in fares charged on the New Haven Line for travel taking place wholly within New York State
payload.subject: New Haven Line fares

records.raw_text: There will be no change in fares charged on the New Haven Line for travel taking place wholly within New York State.

payload.claim_text: New Haven Line fares for travel to or from Connecticut stations be increased by 5%, effective July 1, 2026, with CTDOT reserving the ability to withdraw the July 1, 2026, increase should there be intervening changes to CTDOT's budget
payload.subject: New Haven Line fares to/from Connecticut stations

records.raw_text: CTDOT proposes that New Haven Line fares ... be increased by 5%, effective July 1, 2026, with CTDOT reserving the ability to withdraw the July 1, 2026, increase
